testcase.name: Responsive Layout Tests › Dashboard Layout at 320x568 (Mobile S)
testcase.error:
[chromium] › responsive.spec.ts:14:5 › Responsive Layout Tests › Dashboard Layout at 320x568 (Mobile S)
Test timeout of 30000ms exceeded.
Error: locator.waitFor: Test timeout of 30000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for locator('main') to be visible
at ..\pages\BasePage.ts:16
14 | async waitForHydration() { 15 | // Wait for the app shell to be fully visible, implying hydration is likely complete > 16 | await this.page.locator('main').waitFor({ state: 'visible' }); | ^ 17 | } 18 | 19 | async checkA11y() { at BasePage.waitForHydration (T:\ai mentor studio v2\frontend\e2e\pages\BasePage.ts:16:37) at T:\ai mentor studio v2\frontend\e2e\tests\responsive.spec.ts:20:22

testcase.name: Responsive Layout Tests › Dashboard Layout at 768x1024 (Tablet)
testcase.error:
[Mobile Chrome] › responsive.spec.ts:14:5 › Responsive Layout Tests › Dashboard Layout at 768x1024 (Tablet)
Test timeout of 30000ms exceeded.
Error: locator.waitFor: Test timeout of 30000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for locator('main') to be visible
at ..\pages\BasePage.ts:16
14 | async waitForHydration() { 15 | // Wait for the app shell to be fully visible, implying hydration is likely complete > 16 | await this.page.locator('main').waitFor({ state: 'visible' }); | ^ 17 | } 18 | 19 | async checkA11y() { at BasePage.waitForHydration (T:\ai mentor studio v2\frontend\e2e\pages\BasePage.ts:16:37) at T:\ai mentor studio v2\frontend\e2e\tests\responsive.spec.ts:20:22
